args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
ORDER BY lower(artist), track_id
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
ORDER BY lower(artist), track_id
LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_sales, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS n_tracks FROM sales;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_sales, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS n_tracks FROM sales;

exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
